groups.title: Community Centre Classes
groups.desc:
Questions 1-7
Complete the table below.
Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.

groups.title: Details of Beading Class
groups.desc:
Questions 8-10
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.collect:
The first class starts on: $8$
Cost of the class: $100
Room No.: $9$
Parking: next to a $10$

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: Hello, this is Preston Community Centre.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Oh, hello.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: My name's Andrew Shepherd.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I'm ringing about the classes you offer.

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: OK, Mr. Shepherd.

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: Are there any classes in particular that you're interested in?

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Yes, you've got a class called Photography, I believe?

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: That's right.

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: It's the first time we offer this class because many people enquired about it last term.

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: It'll be held in a library not far from our community centre.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Right.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I know it's on the weekend, right?

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: Yes, it's on Saturday, and it will occupy the whole morning.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: OK.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Um, what do I need to bring?

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: Obviously, you have to bring your own camera.

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: Some people bring a lot of accessories like an extra lens, but there's really no need for this class.

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: It's mainly focusing on composition really, and getting the most out of the basic camera.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: That's exactly what I want.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: OK, then I've heard there's a class on cooking, right?

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: Yes, it's called French cooking class.

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: As the name suggests, it will teach you cooking skills in French cuisine.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Oh, great.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Where will that be held?

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: This class is special, so we arrange it in a kitchen where we can get the necessary cooking equipment.

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: Let me see, yes, the Anita Kitchen.

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: As for the time of the course, it used to be on the second Tuesday of every month, but there's a small adjustment this time.

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: Although it's still held on a monthly basis, the exact time will be changed to the first Tuesday.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Well, actually it's my wife who's really interested, and I think it's a good fit for her because our daughter has to take a guitar lesson every Tuesday, so my wife is available.

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: That's good.

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: But I have to remind you that aprons are not provided in this class, so when you do come, please bring one with you in case you get dirty when cooking.

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: What's more, don't forget to bring some money with you, as the ingredients for cooking, like vegetables or meat, have to be paid by yourself.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: OK, useful information to know.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Then there's another class that my wife would like to join – that's the Beading class.

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: Oh, I've taken the class myself.

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: The tutor is excellent.

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: Last term it was held in a tennis club, which is going to be redecorated soon, so we plan to change this class to a golf club this time.

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: And it'll be held on the evening of every Wednesday.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Do I have to bring the beads with me?

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: Yes, that's the only material needed for this class.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: OK, I think this class is also a good choice for her.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Um, do you have any other classes that I can join?

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: If you like, I think you can take our Painting class.

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: It's a popular class, so this term we're going to move it to a high school so that we get more room.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: What time will it be?

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: It'll be on every Monday evening.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: The time is good for me.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Do I have to bring the paints?

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: Well, paints will be provided by the tutor, I know that.

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: Um, the information says you'll just need some brushes.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I see.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: OK, just another question about the Beading class.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I've just remembered my wife asked me to find out the exact time – when will the first class begin?

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: Well, the deadline for registration is April 30th, and we are not going to start the class until May 15th.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: OK.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: What's the fee for this class?

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: It was 95 dollars last term, but the cost will be a little more this term.

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: Well, let me check the details.

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: OK, it'll be 100 dollars this term, just 5 dollars more.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Sounds reasonable.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Then about the location.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: It's in the club, which room exactly?

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: Room J52.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: OK, just one more question.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Is parking convenient?

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: I'm sorry to tell you that parking space is only available for the club's premier members.

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: But if you drive, there's a parking lot opposite the club, just beside the station.

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: You need to pay only a small parking fee.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: OK.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: That's all I want to know.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I'll call you later after I discuss it with my wife.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Thank you very much.

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: You're welcome.

transcript.speaker: Assistant
transcript.en: Bye!

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Bye!

1.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Saturday；提示词 When、Saturday，此处应填时间类名词。
题目解析：表格题在定位和预判方面难度都不大。本题通过 Saturday 锁定答案句："Yes, it's on Saturday, and it will occupy the whole morning."注意抓取时间类名词即可。因此答案为 morning。

2.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 cooking class；提示词 cooking class，此处应填形容词。
题目解析：本题不难。首先在咨询者的提问中听到 a class on cooking，随后工作人员回答："Yes, it's called French cooking class."其中 be called 意为"叫做"。因此答案为 French。

3.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Anita Kitchen、Tuesday；提示词 When、the，此处应填序数词。
题目解析：听到 Anita Kitchen 出现后就需要注意与时间相关的描述了。本题存在干扰信息。定位词 Tuesday 第一次出现时可听到序数词 second，但注意录音中的 used to 表示过去，紧接着的转折信号词 but 告诉我们过去的情况有变、真正的时间即将出现："... the exact time will be changed to the first Tuesday."因此答案为 first。

4.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 apron、ingredients；提示词 What to bring、an apron，此处应填与 an apron 并列的名词。
题目解析：定位词 apron 先出现，接着通过并列信号词 What's more 预判答案即将出现，注意抓取附近的名词即可。答案句为："What's more, don't forget to bring some money with you ..."其中题干中的 bring 重现，另一个定位词 ingredients 在答案之后紧随出现。因此答案为 money。

5.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Beading class、club；提示词 Where、a、club，此处应填形容词或单数名词。
题目解析：听到 Beading class 出现后就需要注意与地点相关的描述了。本题存在干扰信息。定位词 club 第一次出现时可听到 tennis，但注意它对应的时间是 Last term，随后出现的 golf 对应的时间才是 this time。因此答案为 golf。

6.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 class；提示词 class，此处应填表示课程类型的名词。
题目解析：本题难度较低。首先根据咨询者的提问 "Um, do you have any other classes that I can join?"定位，接着工作人员回答："If you like, I think you can take our Painting class."因此答案为 Painting。

7.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 What to bring；提示词 own，此处应填名词。
题目解析：本题通过咨询者的提问 "Do I have to bring the paints?"定位，随后工作人员回答："Well, paints will be provided by the tutor ..."故排除干扰信息 paints。之后听到："Um, the information says you'll just need some brushes."其中 need 替换了题干中的 bring，抓取其后的名词即可。因此答案为 brushes。

8.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 first class；提示词 on，此处应填星期几或日期。
题目解析：定位词 first class 出现后，先听到了干扰信息 April 30th，提示本题考查的应该是日期，但需要注意的是这是报名的截止日期（the deadline for registration），之后出现的 May 15th 才是开课日期（start the class）。因此答案为 May 15(th) 或 15(th) May。

9.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Room；提示词 No.，此处应填数字或字母和数字的组合。
题目解析：本题较为简单。定位词 Room 原词重现，之后在工作人员的回答中直接抓取房间号即可，无干扰信息，但需注意区分 G 和 J 的发音。因此答案为 J52。

10.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Parking；提示词 next to、a，此处应填地点类单数名词。
题目解析：定位词 Parking 出现后，工作人员首先提到俱乐部的停车位只提供给高级会员，之后才由转折信号词 But 引出答案句："... a parking lot opposite the club, just beside the station."此处替换较简单，beside 替换了提示词 next to，其后名词即为答案。注意原句中的 opposite 与提示词 next to 不符，可排除干扰信息 club。因此答案为 station。
